general.title: General
general.companyNameHint: The display name for your company.
general.descriptionHint: Optional description shown in the company profile.
general.brandColorHint: Sets the hue for the company icon. Leave empty for auto-generated color.
general.logoHint: Upload a PNG, JPEG, WEBP, GIF, or SVG logo image.
general.requireApproval: Require board approval for new hires
general.requireApprovalHint: New agent hires stay pending until approved by board.
general.generateInviteDescription: Generate an OpenClaw agent invite snippet.
general.companyPackagesDescription: Import and export have moved to dedicated pages.
general.archiveDescription: Archive this company to hide it from the sidebar. This persists in the database.
general.inviteHint: Creates a short-lived OpenClaw agent invite and renders a copy-ready prompt.

instance.heartbeatsDescription: Agents with a timer heartbeat enabled across all of your companies.
instance.noHeartbeats: No scheduler heartbeats match the current criteria.

generalSettings.title: General
generalSettings.description: Configure instance-wide defaults that affect how operator-visible logs are displayed.
generalSettings.censorUsernameDescription: Hide the username segment in home-directory paths and similar operator-visible log output. Standalone username mentions outside of paths are not yet masked in the live transcript view. This is off by default.

experimental.title: Experimental
experimental.description: Opt into features that are still being evaluated before they become default behavior.
experimental.enableIsolatedWorkspacesDescription: Show execution workspace controls in project configuration and allow isolated workspace behavior for new and existing issue runs.
experimental.autoRestartDevServerDescription: In pnpm dev:once, wait for all queued and running local agent runs to finish, then restart the server automatically when backend changes or migrations make the current boot stale.
